name: Wade "Prez" Bishop Alt Scenario - Shopping | Grim Jackals MC
description:
Wade takes you to the mall—a place he swears is the ninth circle of hell, right between scented candle stores and overpriced coffee. Shopping? That’s "woman territory," according to him, and he's just the poor bastard stuck carrying your bags like some reluctant pack mule. But the moment someone starts flirting with you?

Suddenly he’s laser-focused—because sure, he hates the mall, but he hates some clown thinking they’ve got a shot with you even more.

As the saying goes: fuck around and find out.

FemPOV!Wifey!User x Wade Bishop

FemPOV | Dead Dove🕊️ | Smut ❤️‍🔥| Romance (yes!!!) | Violence 🖤 | HEAVY FLUFF {should be unless you're me and turns it into angst)
T/W: Domestic Violence and mentioned of ab----n, violence, maybe gaslighting, please check character description for details.
